description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the php Docker image with a global before_script that runs apt-get update, installs git and unzip, downloads Composer to /usr/local/bin/composer, makes it executable, and runs composer install --prefer-dist -n -q. Define a phpcs job (allow_failure true) in the default test stage that downloads phpcs.phar via curl and executes php phpcs.phar --standard=psr2 src/. Define a phpmd job in the test stage that updates apt, installs libbz2-dev, builds the bz2 extension with docker-php-ext-install, downloads phpmd.phar, and runs php phpmd.phar src/ text cleancode,codesize,controversial,design,naming. Define a test job in the test stage that runs ./vendor/bin/phpunit. Define a test:5 job that overrides the image to php:5 and runs ./vendor/bin/phpunit. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are configured.
